criteria_version: search/inclusion_criteria.md §1 (Stage-1 title-abstract screen) — priority batch 3, ranks 200-299

decisions.reason: Psych Science 2001 anchoring-and-adjustment experiments differentiating self-generated vs experimenter-provided anchors; eligible (experimental, anchoring mechanism, judgment outcome).
EJSP 1996 on gain/loss framing × outcome-interdependence (equality/equity); eligible (experimental, framing, distributive-justice outcome relevant to negotiation).
J Behav Decision Making 1994 three experiments on anchoring limits with implausibly extreme anchors; eligible (experimental, anchoring mechanism).
PSPB 1983 Beaman et al. meta-analysis of 120 FITD experimental groups; eligible (meta-analysis of primary FITD literature).
JMR 1980 — duplicate of i=92 (Reingen alternative FITD manipulations); flag at dedup-extraction.
PSPB 1980 FITD experiment with weight-status moderator (small favor → larger volunteer favor); eligible (experimental, FITD, compliance outcome).
JMR 1980 Swedish field experiment on telephone pre-call FITD for mail-survey response rates; eligible (field experiment, FITD, commercial-research compliance).
Int J Psychology 2016 integrative test of FITD via Campbell paradigm; eligible (empirical study, FITD, compliance outcome).
Social and Personality Psych Compass 2007 review of free-will compliance procedures (lowball, teasing, FITD, touch, but-you-are-free); eligible (review of empirical literature).
Health Psych 2005 N=167 study on framing × condom-use messages; eligible (experimental, framing, behavior outcome).
CyberPsych & Behavior 2001 N=1008 web-based FITD field experiment for charitable donation; eligible (field experiment, FITD, donation compliance).
Psychology & Marketing 1996 study of compliance techniques applied to direct-mail charity requests; eligible (review/empirical work on compliance in commercial context).
J Social Psych 1989 N=105 experiment on prior compliance-technique knowledge × subsequent compliance susceptibility (DITF, lowball); eligible (experimental, two techniques, compliance outcome).

J Consumer Behaviour 2023 study using S-O-R framework on social-proof + scarcity dark patterns × personality for online impulse shopping; eligible (commercial setting, persuasion mechanisms, behavior outcome).
Psychology & Marketing 2019 four studies on regulatory focus × self-construal for online luxury purchase intentions; eligible (experimental, regulatory fit, purchase outcome).
Ecopsychology 2010 field experiment on FITD + but-you-are-free for household-waste sorting; eligible (field experiment, FITD, behavior outcome).
Cyberpsychology Behavior 2010 two-group experiment in Second Life e-health marketing on regulatory fit × brand satisfaction/trust; eligible (experimental, regulatory fit, brand-evaluation outcome).
Japanese J Psychology 2008 field experiment on food (positive affect) × DITF compliance; eligible.
Psychology & Marketing 2004 cross-national shopping-simulation experiment on scarcity × purchase intent × cultural moderators; eligible (experimental, scarcity, purchase outcome).
J Applied Soc Psych 1999 experiment on FITD × time delay × requester identity; eligible.
Health Psych 1999 four-frame experiment on sunscreen-use motivation among beach-goers; eligible (experimental, framing, behavior outcome).
European Review Soc Psych 1995 chapter reviewing framing-in-negotiation research; eligible (review of empirical negotiation literature).
J Cross-Cultural Psych 1989 three field experiments on FITD in Paris/Frankfurt/Amsterdam; eligible.
J Social Psych 1982 study on FITD × social labeling combination; eligible.
J Social Psych 1981 N=120 experiment on two-feet-in-the-door procedure with intermediate request; eligible.
J Applied Soc Psych 1979 study on DITF in monetary-donation context with established behavioral standards; eligible.
Psychology & Health 2009 two experiments on framing × prevention/detection function distinction; eligible (experimental, framing, behavior intent outcome).
British J Health Psych 2008 experiment on gain/loss/mixed framing for physical-activity participation; eligible.
Psychology of Addictive Behaviors 2007 RCT N=258 on gain/loss framing × bupropion smoking cessation; eligible.
Health Psych 2004 N=63 experiment on framing × approach/avoidance disposition for flossing; eligible.
J Sustainable Tourism 2018 field + lab experiment on framing × hotel-guest recycling; eligible (field experiment, framing, behavior outcome).

Government Information Quarterly 2017 study on persuasive features (social-proof, authority, consistency) for public-participation processes; eligible (experimental, persuasion mechanisms, participation outcome).
Int J Environmental Research and Public Health 2012 meta-analysis (k=33, N=4168) on framing for skin cancer prevention; eligible (meta-analysis).
Communication Monographs 2007 three experiments (N=189, N=318, N=433) on framing × organ donation × reactance; eligible (experimental, framing, donation outcome).
J Marketing 2020 multiple studies on consumer-brand psychological distance × concrete/abstract language matching; eligible (experimental, construal, consumer-brand outcome).
J Advertising 2018 study on narrative transportation × paratextual SNS features × viral advertising; eligible (advertising context, social-proof, viral-ad outcome).
Int J Marketing Studies 2016 N=500 study on cause-related marketing × sponsor-cause congruence moderation; eligible (survey-experiment, commercial outcomes).
J Exp Psych General 2013 on stickiness of loss vs gain frames in shaping preference; eligible (experimental, framing, behavior outcome).
Health Comm 2012 N=148 study on framing × stages of change for smoking cessation intent; eligible.
J Marketing Communications 2011 replication+extension on cause-related marketing compliance × self-construal across cultures; eligible (replication study, commercial context).
Social Influence 2010 two studies on reverse psychology (strategic self-anticonformity) as persuasion tactic; eligible (experimental, influence tactic, persuasion outcome).
Communication Research Reports 2003 experiment on framing × processing depth for testicular self-examination; eligible.
Communication Research 2002 experiment on guilt-induction + guilt-reduction in DITF; eligible (experimental, DITF, compliance outcome).
Basic and Applied Soc Psych 1999 studies on TNA × initial request size; eligible (experimental, TNA, compliance outcome).
PSPB 1998 chocolate-sale TNA experiment with mindfulness moderator; eligible (field experiment in commercial setting, TNA, purchase outcome).
Human Communication Research 1997 guilt-based explanation of DITF (theoretical synthesis of empirical evidence); eligible (synthesis with effect-size evidence).
Communication Research Reports 1993 FITD field study on bartender drunk-driving taxi-calling (N=15+15); eligible (field study, FITD, compliance outcome).
PSPB 1983 FITD study on donor petition-signing followed by donation rates; eligible.
Social Cognition 1982 study on reinforcement + self-attribution accounts of FITD; eligible (experimental, FITD, compliance outcome).
JMR 1981 study on FITD + cash incentives + followups for survey response; eligible (experimental, FITD, commercial-survey-compliance outcome).
JPSP 1976 study on relationship between FITD compliance and first-request size; eligible (empirical FITD paper in seminal venue).
J Health Comm 2024 PMID — randomized survey experiments in South Africa on behaviorally informed messages for COVID vaccination; eligible (RCT, persuasion messages, behavior intent).

J Exp Psych General 2022 seven primary + six supplemental experiments on unlikelihood effect (enumerated causes → perceived likelihood); risk/judgment mechanism but not commercial decision context; need full text per §2.1.
PSPR 2022 two meta-analyses on emotion-regulation by psychological distance / level of abstraction; not commercial decision context; need full text per §2.1.
JPSP 2022 studies (N=3559) on regulatory fit × moral predispositions including sexting-decision outcome; need full text to judge §2.1 applicability.
J Exp Psych Human Perception 2019 on psychological distance modulating imitation forms; basic cognitive perception research, not commercial or persuasion outcome; fails §2.1.
Clinical Psychological Science 2019 on attachment security HPA-axis preadolescent stress responses; pediatric clinical study, no commercial mechanism; fails §2.1.

Health Comm 2015 study on authority badges + popularity indicators × online forum participation moderated by locus of control; eligible (experimental, authority + social-proof cues, behavior outcome).
Psychological Bulletin 2014 two meta-analyses on psychological distance × abstraction; eligible (meta-analysis of construal-level primary literature).
PSPB 2013 five studies on psychological distance × temporal discounting (Paris trip outcome); construal mechanism but not commercial persuasion; need full text per §2.1.
Psychological Science 2013 stereotype-threat × regulatory-fit × older-adult memory; cognitive psych basic research on memory task; fails §2.1 (not commercial decision).
Psychological Science 2013 three experiments on resource scarcity × childhood SES → spending vs saving; eligible (experimental, scarcity mechanism, commercial-decision outcome).
JPSP 2012 on psychological distance × cause vs consequence focus in judgment/choice; construal mechanism but need full text to determine if any task is commercial decision.
PSPB 2012 five experiments on visual vs verbal communication × psychological distance; interpersonal communication, not commercial; need full text per §2.1.
EJSP 2012 on counterfactual thinking × psychological distance; basic cognitive mechanism, need full text to check task domain.
Psychological Science 2012 spider-fear affect-labeling between-subjects experiment; labeling mechanism but clinical/therapeutic context; need full text to judge sales-mechanism parallel per §5.1.
Basic and Applied Soc Psych 2012 on regulatory-fit × end-of-semester test performance (math problems); academic-test context not commercial; fails §2.1.
JPSP 2011 on interpersonal regulatory fit (advice from another) on individual goal pursuit; need full text to check if any task is commercial decision.
J Applied Psychology 2011 team-structure × regulatory-task within-teams experiment; organizational behavior but not consumer/sales; need full text to judge.
JPSP 2010 six experiments on emotional intensity × perceived psychological distance; emotion regulation mechanism, not commercial decision; need full text per §2.1.
J Exp Psych LMC 2010 on regulatory fit × systematic exploration in dynamic decision-making; need full text to check if task domain is commercial.

Psychological Science 2009 four experiments on commitment-consistency × public intentions × identity goals (becoming lawyer); commitment mechanism but identity-goal context not commercial; need full text per §2.1.
Basic and Applied Soc Psych 2009 boundary-condition experiment on regulatory fit; need full text to check task domain.
J Exp Psych General 2008 on motor-behavior labeling and approach/avoidance; basic cognitive/affective mapping research, not commercial; fails §2.1.

PSPB 2007 four experiments on decisions for future selves vs others (disgusting liquid, peer tutoring, charity emails, lottery deferral); some are donation/charity decisions that meet §2.4 but the main thrust is psychological-distance research; need full text.
JESP 2007 field experiment on regulatory fit messages for promoting physical activity; eligible (field experiment, regulatory fit, behavior outcome).
PSPB 2007 mortality-salience × promotion-focus × zeal reactions; not commercial decision context; need full text per §2.1.
J Exp Psych General 2006 IAT-based test of distance-construal association; basic cognitive research, not commercial outcome; uncertain per §2.1.
JPSP 2006 six experiments on power priming × abstract processing; basic cognitive research, not commercial; need full text per §2.1.
Psychological Science 2006 two experiments on spatial distance × construal of social events; basic cognitive research, not commercial outcome; uncertain per §2.1.
JPSP 2006 three experiments on regulatory fit × stop rules; effort allocation, not commercial decision; need full text per §2.1.
J Exp Psych Animal Behavior 2003 rat appetitive conditioning experiments; animal study, fails §2.1 entirely.
JPSP 1995 Cialdini PFC scale development and validation against FITD/dissonance/balance; eligible (experimental, FITD mechanism, compliance outcome).
Psychological Bulletin 1990 gender × leadership-style meta-analysis; leadership not commercial persuasion or compliance; fails §2.1.
JPSP 1975 fear appeals × physiological arousal × cigarette smoking attitudes; eligible (experimental, persuasion appeal, attitude/behavior outcome).
J Exp Psychology 1949 on reminiscence in serial verbal learning; basic memory research, not persuasion; fails §2.1.
Health Comm 2010 study on framing × attitude/quality × antidrug ads for adolescents; eligible.
Health Comm 2008 N=210 experiment on gain/loss-framed Canadian cigarette warning labels for adolescents; eligible.
Journal of Communication 2006 review on strategic use of gain/loss framing for cancer-care behavior; eligible (synthesis of empirical framing literature in health behavior).
JESP 2006 on implementation intentions in negotiation prosocial-goal pursuit; eligible (experimental, intention manipulation, negotiation outcome).
OBHDP 1998 on negotiator risk × reference points × agreement outcomes; eligible (negotiation experiment, framing/anchoring mechanism).
Management Science 2026 high-powered stress-test replication of myopic loss aversion; eligible (preregistered replication, framing mechanism, risk-taking outcome — financial decision context).
J Business Research 2024 experiment on virtual influencers × psychological distance × trustworthiness; eligible (experimental, construal, consumer-perception outcome).
Scandinavian J Psychology 2023 two experiments on DITF + negative affect mechanism; eligible (experimental, DITF, compliance outcome).

J Criminal Psychology 2023 two experiments on Cialdini social-influence techniques × eyewitness recall; influence techniques used but outcome is recall not commercial compliance; need full text per §4.4.

Management Science 2022 lab experiment on loss-framed incentives × employee multitasking + theft/help behaviors; framing manipulation but outcome is employee misbehavior, borderline for §2.1; need full text.
Frontiers in Psychology 2022 PMID — experimental study on anchoring effect of consumers' price judgment in scenes; eligible (experimental, anchoring, consumer pricing decision).
J Consumer Behaviour 2021 on outcome presence × regulatory fit for gain/loss goal framing in persuasion; eligible (experimental, regulatory fit, persuasion outcome).
Political Psychology 2020 on loss aversion in personal vs political situations; political-decision context not commercial; need full text per §2.1.

Management Science 2017 randomized field experiment on signals (certification, customer endorsement, social-proof) for early-stage equity investment decisions; eligible (RCT, social-proof, commercial-investment outcome).
